title: Embellished Stone (Advancements Plaques)
description: For use with the Advancement Plaques mod, gives them a look of embellished stone.
body:
This resource pack replaces the default look of advancement plaques with an embellished stone look.

Note: This resource pack requires Advancement Plaques to function.

 

 

You may use this resource pack in modpacks.  Make sure you include Advancement Plaques!

 

Problems, feature request, something else?  Join us on Discord!
